Services → Marketing Service → Case Study

From Word of Mouth to Google's Top 3: A Lake Macquarie Tradesman's Story

🔧 Trades & Builders

Top 3

on Google Maps for "plumber Lake Macquarie"

12

new jobs per month from Google alone

4.9★

Google rating (38 reviews)

About the Client

An owner-operator plumbing business based in Lake Macquarie with 12 years of hands-on experience. Mark built his business the traditional way — exceptional work, happy customers, steady referrals. By any measure it was a successful small business. But it had a single point of failure: when referrals slowed down (as they inevitably do over Christmas and January), there was no other lead source to fall back on.

The Challenge

Mark had no website. His Google Business Profile was unclaimed, meaning competitors — some newer, some less experienced — were showing up above him when local homeowners searched for a plumber. During a slow January, revenue dropped 40% because referrals dried up and there was simply no other way for new customers to find him. Newer plumbing businesses with basic websites and optimised Google profiles were capturing work that should have been his.

What We Did

  • Built a clean, fast-loading website optimised for local plumber searches — clear services, service area, and a prominent click-to-call button
  • Claimed and fully optimised the Google Business Profile: 40 photos, complete service list, areas served, and business attributes
  • Local SEO strategy targeting "plumber Lake Macquarie", "emergency plumber Newcastle", and 12 suburb-specific keyword variations
  • Review generation system — a simple follow-up SMS template Mark sends to happy customers after a job, consistently converting satisfied customers into 5-star reviews
  • Listed on 8 local business directories with consistent NAP (name, address, phone) data to strengthen local search signals

The Results

Within 4 months, the business was ranking in the top 3 positions on Google Maps for "plumber Lake Macquarie" and its surrounding suburbs. Mark now receives an average of 12 new job enquiries per month from Google — customers who have never been referred by anyone, who simply found him because he showed up first. His Google rating reached 4.9 stars with 38 reviews, making him the highest-rated plumber in the area. January is no longer a problem: Google fills the gaps that referrals used to leave.

"I was embarrassed I didn't have a website — thought it was for big companies. Now I get calls from people I've never met saying they found me on Google. Best investment I've made in the business."

— Mark, Owner

Ready to Get Found by Local Customers?

If you're a tradesperson relying entirely on word of mouth, you're one slow month away from a cash flow crisis. We get local tradespeople onto the first page of Google — with a website, optimised Google profile, and a review strategy that compounds over time.

See Our Local Marketing Package
